ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomic_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "contig" INTEGER /* Contig number of the dataset */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the dataset */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the dataset */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the dataset (e.g., AGCATCCCTGAGCCCC) */,
  "gene" TEXT /* Gene annotations of the dataset */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the dataset (e.g., intergenic, intronic) */,
  "top_case_zscore" REAL /* Top case z-score of the dataset */,
  "high_case_counts" TEXT /* High case counts of the dataset */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, FASTA, BAM) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., SRA, ENA) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the dataset (e.g., intergenic, intronic) */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the dataset is public or private */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the dataset has been accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_datasets_unit FOREIGN KEY ("unit") REFERENCES units ("unit_sequence"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_datasets_gene FOREIGN KEY ("gene") REFERENCES genes ("gene_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_datasets_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_datasets_contig FOREIGN KEY ("contig") REFERENCES contigs ("contig_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "contigs" (
  "contig_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contig */,
  "contig_number" INTEGER /* Contig number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contig */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the contig */,
  "gc_content" REAL /* GC content of the contig */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the contig was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the contig was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contig_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome on which the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the gene (e.g., +, -) */,
  "gene_type" TEXT /* Type of the gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the gene was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the gene was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., intergenic, intronic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome associated with the region */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the region */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the unit (e.g., AGCATCCCTGAGCCCC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the unit (e.g., DNA, RNA) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the unit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "z_scores" (
  "z_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each z-score */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the z-score belongs to */,
  "z_score_value" REAL /* Value of the z-score */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the z-score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the z-score was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the z-score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("z_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_z_scores_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genomic_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_counts" (
  "case_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case count */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the case count belongs to */,
  "case_count_value" TEXT /* Value of the case count */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the case count */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the case count was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the case count was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_counts_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genomic_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genomic_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, FASTA, BAM) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genomic_datasets ("dataset_id")
)
